Localization.Description: Suspicious connection to FortiGate hardware. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to FortiGate hardware via the {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {event_src.host}. The protocol is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to FortiGate hardware on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} connected to FortiGate hardware on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
